query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM puzzles; SELECT COUNT(*) as classified FROM puzzles WHERE openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' AND openingName != 'Opening' AND openingName != 'Unknown' AND openingName != 'Unclassified';
